## Functional checks

- [ ] Navigation works on desktop and mobile.
- [ ] Logo and images load with useful alternative text.
- [ ] Keyboard navigation and focus are usable.
- [ ] Contact form submits and delivery is confirmed.
- [ ] Legacy routes redirect permanently.
- [ ] `robots.txt` and `sitemap.xml` return `200`.
- [ ] Apex is canonical and `www` redirects to it.
